sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
OK so LEFT moved the W-box back left by 1 (from cols 25-27 to cols 24-26). So:
- RIGHT moves W-box right
- LEFT moves W-box left
The B-box on the right panel stays stationary.
Now I need to figure out the goal. Let me think about this more carefully. The charcoal boxes are at:
- Left: rows 32-36, cols 11-15
- Right: rows 26-30, cols 44-48 (but it seems damaged/distorted)
The W-box is at rows 30-32, cols 24-26. It can move left/right but not up/down (I haven't tried UP/DOWN yet).
The B-box is at rows 30-32, cols 42-44. It's on the right panel.
Wait, maybe I need to think about this differently. Maybe the green boxes need to be placed INSIDE the charcoal boxes. The charcoal boxes are 5x5 with a 3x3 white interior. The green boxes are 3x3. So they could fit inside.
Left charcoal box interior: rows 33-35, cols 12-14
Right charcoal box interior: rows 27-29, cols 45-47
For the W-box to enter the left charcoal box, it needs to be at rows 33-35, cols 12-14. Currently it's at rows 30-32, cols 24-26. So it needs to move left AND down.
Let me try DOWN to see if the W-box can move vertically.

<parameter=code>

action(['DOWN'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
